leadText: Scratch (Japanese: ひっかく Scratch) is a damage-dealing Normal-type move introduced in Generation I.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Scratch inflicts damage and has no secondary effect. Scratch can be used as the first move of a Pokémon Contest combination , causing Fury Swipes and Slash to score double the normal appeal if used in the next turn. It can also be used to finish a combination, with the user gaining 4 bonus appeal points if Leer was used in the previous turn.
